sentMail.subject: Re: Quick look at your new-patient flow
sentMail.bodyPreview:
Hi Ada,

Following up on the growth audit — the write-up is ready whenever you want to walk through it. Most clinics use a 20-minute call to see which openings matter first.

Grab a time that works here: https://calendly.com/demo-agency/intro-call?utm_source=clientforce&utm_content=cmrw1ugu4000i7dhomj7fos9b

Happy to fit around your schedule either way.

--
100 Demo Street, Suite 4, Austin, TX 787
